svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

path.style: stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 87, 0), rgb(130, 205, 130));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 87, 0), rgb(130, 205, 130)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 87, 0), rgb(130, 205, 130));
